entity_wiki_page.body: Apple Inc reported strong quarterly results with iPhone revenue up 15%. The company continues to invest in AI capabilities. Services revenue reached a record high driven by App Store and subscription growth. Tim Cook highlighted expansion into emerging markets.

thesis_wiki_pages.body: Small-cap biotech thesis: focus on late-stage clinical catalysts with binary readouts. Key metrics: FDA PDUFA dates, Phase 3 success rates, cash runway. Portfolio targets companies with orphan drug designations and strong IP moats.

portfolio_wiki_pages.body: Apple Inc reported strong quarterly results with iPhone revenue up 15%.
Microsoft Azure cloud revenue grew 29% YoY, driven by AI services adoption.
